queue.title: Initial QA — rhp-claude project setup
queue.description: Run /qa-check on orchestrator.js. Verify Barba namespaces, Lenis init, GSAP context cleanup, and reduced-motion guard are all in place before first deploy.

queue.title: Nav compass — rotary switch navigation (reusable 2/3/4 links)
queue.description: Three-way rotary switch with compass dial. Anchor links: Surface=home, Dive=below, Contact=contact. Hover primes dial ~10deg, click rotates + scrolls. Reusable pattern for 2-4 links. Accessible (aria-hidden dial, reduced-motion skip). Webflow component.

queue.title: Hero background — decorative SVG arch shape
queue.description: Single organic SVG arch shape (Figma 16:522) behind hero text. Absolute positioned, full-width. Webflow structure built (sz-hero-section + sz-hero-bg embed). CSS in styles/studio-zissou.css. SVG renders but needs colour/visibility debugging — shape fill #E1E3DC is very subtle against #EBEDE6 page background. Webflow component.

queue.title: Hero title — 'Studio Zissou' + tagline with SplitText entrance
queue.description: Character-by-character entrance animation via GSAP SplitText (or SVG path animation if SVG format chosen). Tagline follows after title. Format TBD (text vs SVG for viewport-width scaling). Section-level element in hero.

queue.title: Intro text — right-aligned body paragraphs
queue.description: Two-paragraph intro block, right-aligned. PP Rader Regular 14px, #2A2A2A. Static, no animation. Section-level element in hero.

queue.title: Work clients — CMS list with hover preview images + bracket chars
queue.description: CMS-driven client list. Hover fades in preview image at fixed position. All clients have external URLs with ↗ arrow. Font feature settings for bracket characters. CMS collection: name, preview image, URL, display order. Section-level element in work.

queue.title: Decorative ovals — breathing gills animation (Ghibli-inspired)
queue.description: Five oval SVGs. Inner SVG flips horizontally (scaleX), cascading right-to-left with stagger, 4s pause, repeat. Ghibli airship breathing gills aesthetic. GSAP timeline. Section-level element in gills.

queue.title: Quality cards — scroll-triggered reveal (Interfaces/Code/Decisions)
queue.description: Three cards with corner pins and dashed connectors. ScrollTrigger-driven reveal: line draws, corners appear, content fades in. Decorative elements, no interaction. Webflow component.

queue.title: Contact CTA — heading + body + scroll anchor (mobile only)
queue.description: 'Let's Talk It Through' heading, body paragraph, 'Get in touch →' anchor link. Link scrolls to form on mobile only (form stacks below on mobile). Section-level element in contact.

queue.title: Contact form — postcard/telegram styled Webflow native form
queue.description: Vintage postcard aesthetic. Italian labels, SZ monogram, Name/Email/Message fields with dashed underlines. Webflow native form submission. Placeholder copy TBD. Webflow component.

queue.title: Class UUID Registry + Duplicate Cleanup
queue.description: Capture real project class UUIDs from Designer via CDP, use them during wf-gen to avoid duplicate classes on paste. Plus MCP-based cleanup command for existing duplicates.

queue.title: Footer — © SZ, logo/trumpet, Privacy · Terms
queue.description: Simple flex row: © SZ left, SZ logo/trumpet graphic centre, Privacy · Terms right. Webflow component.

queue.title: Hero section — assemble nav-compass, hero-background, hero-title, intro-text
queue.description: Build the hero section: full-bleed layout with hero-background (component), nav-compass (component), hero-title (section element, SplitText animation), and intro-text (section element, right-aligned). Absolute positioning for background and title layers.

queue.title: Work section — CMS client list with hover previews
queue.description: Build the work section: contains work-clients (section element). CMS-bound client list with hover preview images, bracket characters, ↗ external links. Set up Projects/Clients CMS collection.

queue.title: Gills section — decorative ovals with breathing animation
queue.description: Build the gills section: contains decorative-ovals (section element). Five SVG ovals with cascading scaleX flip animation, 4s pause, repeat. GSAP timeline. Ghibli-inspired breathing gills.

queue.title: Quality section — scroll-triggered card reveal
queue.description: Build the quality section: contains quality-cards (component). 'Respect for Quality' heading, body text, 3 scroll-triggered cards (Interfaces/Code/Decisions) with corner pins and dashed connectors. ScrollTrigger timeline.

queue.title: Contact section — CTA + postcard form layout
queue.description: Build the contact section: two-column layout with contact-cta (section element) left and contact-form (component) right. Stacks on mobile with scroll anchor.

queue.title: Footer section — assemble footer component
queue.description: Build the footer section: wraps the footer component. Simple section wrapper with appropriate spacing and background.

queue.title: Replace component placeholders in style guide as each component is built
queue.description: As each SZ component is built, update the style guide page with live examples replacing placeholder sections.

queue.title: Transition dial canvas pixelated during about→home grow animation
queue.description: .transition-dial canvas looks pixelated when growing from small (6rem) to large during the about→home reverse transition. The canvas backing buffer is drawn at the small size and CSS-stretches as the wrapper grows. Needs a resize strategy that redraws the canvas at the target large resolution before or during the grow animation. Shrinking (home→about) is crisp because the buffer starts at large resolution.

queue.title: Debug and refine home↔about transition dial animation
queue.description:
Multiple issues after transition-dial large-buffer fix:
1. about→home: transition overlay disappears before animation completes — on homepage after transition the overlay may need to stay visible longer
2. home→about: dial starts moving from top of page instead of its natural position — likely a display none→flex issue causing getBoundingClientRect to return 0,0 before the element is laid out
3. home→about: transition dial looks pixelated at the end of the shrink (small size) — buffer is large but CSS 100% at 6rem may need a final resize() call at the small rendered size
4. Easing refinement: try expo.inOut or similar for smoother feel on both directions
All issues are in orchestrator.js runHomeToAboutTransition / runAboutToHomeTransition and transition-dial.js.

queue.title: Site review: finding schema, logger, and configuration thresholds
queue.description: Project scaffold at tools/site-review/. Create the unified Finding data model (createFinding/validateFinding), DEBUG-gated logger, and config module with severity thresholds for all checks. Foundation for all subsequent stages.

queue.title: Site review: page fetcher with cache and sitemap discovery
queue.description: Shared page fetcher that caches HTML, headers, status code, and redirect chain per URL per run. Sitemap.xml parser with fallback to manual --pages flag. Every check module depends on these utilities.

queue.title: Site review: HTML checks — meta tags, image alt text, security headers
queue.description: First three checks, all pure HTML parsers. Meta tags checks title, description, OG, and canonical. Image alt detects missing alt attributes. Security headers checks HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, and others. Validates the check module contract pattern.

queue.title: Site review: network checks — broken links, redirect chains, mixed content, PageSpeed Insights
queue.description: Four checks involving network requests. Broken links sends HTTP HEAD requests with concurrency limit. Redirect chains follows hops and reports loops. Mixed content detects HTTP resources on HTTPS pages. PageSpeed Insights calls the free Google API for Core Web Vitals and Lighthouse scores.

queue.title: Site review: custom code extraction and AI review via Playwright and Claude
queue.description: Use Playwright to visit each page and extract inline scripts, styles, and Webflow embed blocks. Filter out known CDN libraries. Send custom code to Claude API for quality analysis, refactoring suggestions, and security review.

queue.title: Site review: check runner, report generators, and CLI entry point — tier one complete
queue.description: Runner dynamically loads check modules, runs them in parallel, collects and validates findings. JSON and markdown report generators output to reports/<domain>-<date>/. CLI entry point with --url, --tier, --pages, --skip flags. Tier one health check is fully functional after this stage.

queue.title: Site review: CSV importers for Screaming Frog and SE Ranking exports
queue.description: Parse Screaming Frog pages and links CSV exports plus SE Ranking audit CSV into the unified Finding schema. Normalise and deduplicate imported findings against automated findings. Uses Node readline, no external CSV library.

queue.title: Restructure Barba namespace layout for seamless home-work transitions
queue.description: Move dial component and videos outside Barba swap zone. Barba container inside dial_layer-fg swaps only page content. Identical outer shells on home and work pages. data-dial-ns attribute on dial_component controls visibility. GSAP leave() hook for morph animation before DOM swap. Persistent video, lazy dial re-init on return.

queue.title: Fix 6 Barba home-work transition bugs (ticks clipped, video blank, labels, scroll, scrollbar, z-index)
queue.description: Fix tick clipping (overflow:visible), video blank frame (pin video-wrap before ns change), labels visible on work (opacity !important + JS guard), scroll broken (clear overflow in afterEnter), scrollbar visible (hide on child elements), dial not appearing on return (z-index restoration).

queue.title: Site review: accessibility deep-dive and tier two integration
queue.description: Accessibility check using axe-core via Playwright — contrast, form labels, ARIA, focus states, heading hierarchy. Wire CSV importers into the runner for --tier 2 flow. Add --sf-pages, --sf-links, --se-ranking CLI flags. Tier two full review is complete after this stage.
